metadata.description: Synthesized findings NOT captured in network-map.json, launch-history.json, or STRATEGY.md. Two top-level sections: profit_extraction_map (long-standing) and extracted_findings_2026_04_26 (cleanup pass).

profit_extraction_map.description: Seven routes for extracting profits from the network.

route_a.name: Collection Wallet Route
route_a.flow: Deployers (L4-L10) + Ed4UGBWK + Bundles + Hub + Eggsheeran + JETNUT → Collection Wallet (Bra1HUNK) → Token Millionaire (49mvMufi, Fireblocks)

route_b.name: Secondary Aggregator Route
route_b.flow: OG Deployer + Hub + Bundles 1/3/5 + 6UrYwo9F relay → 2q8nSJgC → Token Millionaire (49mvMufi, Fireblocks)

route_c.name: Fireblocks Passthrough Route
route_c.flow: L7 Deployer ($31.6K) + Bundles 1/3/5/6 + Hub ($1.8K) → 9exPdTUV (Fireblocks passthrough) → 9cDDJ5g2 (Fireblocks Custody shared wallet). On-chain trail ends here.
route_c.note: Route C terminates at Fireblocks Custody (9cDDJ5g2), a shared infrastructure wallet (isUserAddress=false). Prior claim that it feeds into Route B via 2q8nSJgC is UNVERIFIABLE on-chain. The $49K may reach Token Millionaire through internal Fireblocks processes, but we cannot trace it.

route_d.name: Direct Coinbase Deposit 2
route_d.flow: Hub ($5.2K) + l9_funder ($3.1K) + jetnut_network ($2.7K) + Bundle 5 ($2.5K) + OG ($1.1K) + Bundles 2/3 → BR1HiYtc (Coinbase Deposit 2) → Coinbase hot wallets

route_e.name: Primary Coinbase Cashout
route_e.flow: Rollbit Treasury ($235K winnings) + Hub ($13.8K) + OG ($11.3K) + L4 ($4.9K) + Bundles 2/5/6 ($5.6K) + Eggsheeran ($1.8K) + 9cDDJ5g2 ($510) → coinbase_deposit (J6YUyB4P) → CB1-CB10 ($265K+)
route_e.note: Largest single cashout route. Rollbit winnings ($235K) dominate inflows.

route_f.name: Rollbit Gambling Cycle
route_f.flow: CB1-CB10 ($184K) + L8 ($4.3K) + profit_pass_2 ($5.9K) + Bundles + deployers → rollbit_deposit (RB3dQF6T) → Rollbit Treasury ($233K)
route_f.note: Money cycles: network profits → Coinbase cashout → Coinbase sends to rollbit_deposit → Rollbit gambling.

route_g.name: USDC Conversion + Binance
route_g.flow: OG/Eggsheeran/L8/LFS/Bundle 4/l9_funder → cold_usdc_2 (EAcUbdoi) → SOL-USDC swaps + 7RLD6F9S (Fireblocks, $4K) + yNanvu8H ($2.2K USDC). Also: OG/L7 → routes_binance → Binance Deposit Fx7gAJpk ($1K) + 7RLD6F9S ($2.6K)
route_g.volume: $6.6K to 7RLD6F9S Fireblocks + $2.2K USDC to yNanvu8H + $1K to Binance

endpoint.token_millionaire: 49mvMufixEbUMzZEUVAnbQ8hLLuEWy789XfKUNTz7wCv — Fireblocks Custody (Arkham). Sends $45.3M to Large Funding Source. Registry verdict (2026-03-31, not revalidated): does not appear in any traced deployer-network outbound chain in the reviewed window.
endpoint.total_extracted: $400K+ confirmed. Routes E and F overlap significantly — Rollbit winnings flow to Coinbase, Coinbase funds flow back to Rollbit.

profit_extraction_map.fireblocks_caveat: Arkham labels many wallets 'Fireblocks Custody' on Solana — broad label covering any wallet interacting with Fireblocks infrastructure. Does NOT mean same entity.

extracted_findings_2026_04_26.description: Findings extracted during 2026-04-26 cleanup pass before deleting source files in archive/raw-results/ (39 files) and archive/handoffs/ (5 SESSION_HANDOFF_*.md). Registry-shape entries kept here so cleanup didn't drop signal. Pending registry promotion via reviewed patch.

novel_wallets_pending_registry_review.source: Helius getWalletIdentity (2026-04-25); also queued in current-wallet-review-scope.json as proposed_patch_outline
novel_wallets_pending_registry_review.evidence: Helius identity = Bitstamp Hot Wallet. ~44,987 SOL balance. Pre-activated MP1 candidate id 148 (6uYzo6ZRYehusYyaaM8XbZE11da98hyaryBtDKVyB8Bb) with 0.135 SOL 11 minutes before MoonPay funding.
Receives $7.5K from registry's ChcEbZW2 across 9 transactions; largest outflow target. Funded by 2ZrTHH1SyvwLPsypKazVUWQ2DjdxZi9xg4XjqkcBe253.
Funded by BmFdpraQhkiDQE6SnfG5omcA1VwzqfXrwtNYBwWTymy6 (KuCoin Hot Wallet 2). Sends $701 to GoonPump (231fshU82vSSeyytyCZJUEUG8Ti3UAgnDSoNFGTETCuK).
Nansen 'Distributor' label. Funded by u6PJ8DtQuPFnfmwHbGFULQ4u4EgjDiyYKjVEsynXq2w (Nansen 'Gate: Wallet'). Sends $1,249 to GoonPump.
Rollbit-prefix vanity. Arkham returns 10 batch-tx hashes shared with sibling RB2Yz3VS. Registry mentions Rollbit batch-tx anomaly in rollbit_deposit notes but doesn't carry this address.
Same anomaly cluster as RB5KKB7h — identical 10 batch-tx hashes.
Solana .sol domain 'lucky🍀flip🎰gg.sol' / 'casino🎲flip🎰gg.sol' (Nansen). Bulk dust-spammer (1 lamport pings) to deployer-network and non-network wallets.

novel_wallets_pending_registry_review.proposed_label: flip-gg.sol gambling-domain dust spammer (companion of AFXigaYu)

novel_wallets_pending_registry_review.evidence: Every occurrence is direction=in, amount=1 lamport SOL. Provider enrichment in correct-cashout-profile.json labels source as 'Spam'. Operational pair with FLipG5QHjZe1H12f6rr5LCnrmqjhwuBTBp78GwzxnwkR. See negative_findings_preserved for evidence-scope ruling out deployer-signal interpretation.

novel_wallets_pending_registry_review.proposed_label: flip-gg.sol gambling dust spammer (companion of FLipgewP)
novel_wallets_pending_registry_review.source: archive/raw-results/* — 70+ occurrences across same 10 raw-result files
novel_wallets_pending_registry_review.evidence: Same pattern as FLipgewP. Same provider 'Spam' label.

negative_findings_preserved.description: Interpretive findings worth preserving so future passes don't re-investigate.
negative_findings_preserved.flip_prefix_pair_is_not_deployer_signal: FLipgewPwNeqvwPFW3CvMTLpHTvuX7BQoXC6xhrWiCR3 + FLipG5QHjZe1H12f6rr5LCnrmqjhwuBTBp78GwzxnwkR were initially considered as parallel to the 2Zi-prefix vanity cluster. Evidence rules that out: (a) bulk-fanout to many unrelated wallets including out-of-network targets (e.g. 9exPdTUV Fireblocks passthrough); (b) provider-enrichment labels source as 'Spam'; (c) infrastructure for the flip-gg.sol gambling/casino dusting service — companion vanity wallets AFXigaYu and BMq4XUa3 carry Nansen .sol domain labels for casino🎲flip🎰gg.sol etc. Verdict: gambling-domain dust-spammer, not deployer signal.
negative_findings_preserved.odin_pinger_family_is_generic_monitoring: Per SESSION_HANDOFF_2026-04-25.md analytical finding 1: odin-prefix family (8+ siblings observed) appears to be a generic fresh-wallet monitoring service (likely MEV/sniper). Earlier CoinSpot-batch interpretation that odin pings were a deployer signal is materially weakened by direct evidence: odin pingers were observed pinging confirmed memecoin traders within hours of MoonPay funding. HYM-prefix tradecraft on L10 deployer (preserved in current-wallet-review-scope.json) remains the only confirmed deployer-network vanity signal beyond 2Zi.
negative_findings_preserved.tri_prefix_is_broadcast_pinger: TriQKRfbS1v63hvHpLWNnb51VL9GvVeotTYYXSfUDHb attempted 1-lamport pings to 20+ wallets in a single failed multi-target tx — broadcaster behavior, not targeted-operator behavior. Low signal.

suggestive_leads_low_confidence.context: Arkham 'J5XGHm on Pump.fun' (Pump.fun deployer alias), 317.9 SOL balance. Direct counterparty in RXRP repump trace.
Distinct address from registry's FKjuwJzHn4hqSfarMMsKjzsNUzEuWzzDM4ZcqJzuATqu. Profile claims funding-chain inbound but Helius shows 0 sigs / 0 transfers / 0 balance.
suggestive_leads_low_confidence.next_step: Verify on-chain — likely transcription error (CLAUDE.md primitive-integrity past-incidents flagged FKjuw prefix specifically).

suggestive_leads_low_confidence.context: Arkham 'daddyisback on Pump.fun'. Single-tx sender to registry's 21wG4F3Z (binance_deposit_generic, not_network).
suggestive_leads_low_confidence.next_step: Likely external retail. Drop unless other links surface.

evidence_pointers_kept_in_data_results.description: Handoff narratives were synthesis. The underlying evidence files remain in data/results/ and are the source-of-truth for these findings.
evidence_pointers_kept_in_data_results.susye_mass_arming_l11_evidence: data/results/figg-l11-armed-check-2026-04-25.json — SUSYE deployer 2Zizao3xpJGsoUFdvTJjYL8LijtFxR9v36cNBeDJJVSz funded 9 wallets in a 12-min window 2026-04-22 12:59-13:11 UTC, each bracketed by 2Zi-prefix dust pings (decisive H1 evidence for SUSYE/DmA9 half). Tier-1 L11 candidate list lives in this file.
evidence_pointers_kept_in_data_results.operator_known_dev_wallets_cross_ref: data/results/operator-known-dev-wallets-2026-04-25.json — 33 operator-supplied dev wallets, 21 already in registry, 12 net-new, 1 dropped (HV1KXxWFaSeriyFvXyx48FqG9BoFbfinB8njCJonqP7K = OKX DEX Router Authority, not a wallet). Zero overlap with Figg-cluster member set.
evidence_pointers_kept_in_data_results.figg_phase_d_arkham_attribution: data/results/figg-phase-d-attribution-extracted-2026-04-25.json — 77-address Arkham label sweep. Confirmed labels: 2eVVdqWN4t7umzXGxJ21uTpB5WrUyyQMYnkq6UHtg3ba + 83Nf4kNbeaRSGwjYyStK4F3ctmH3v5Yar2GmWv9fJqf6 = Rainbet Deposit; 5HQZd9ovzAF1TLnHRAq1zcSnXC9HAp3EwhoxMHvo8rxB = Rainbet Hot Wallet; 2wGZCehkDBMDPLMNXJjFf7kjAm46MJV3t3htmGVa4S16 = Kraken Deposit; 43PcTMd37rBVECXqPjqSHBaM2JMPbiFvpF2Eei8u3LyU = Coinbase Deposit; 784bxhz6xUA88Rk6jb1aTU7FjjkoxAmASsrSDEry2Zvw = userEntity 'Panther'. Pending registry-note updates.
evidence_pointers_kept_in_data_results.h1_vs_h2_session_verdict: 2026-04-25 session verdict: ~70-75% H1 (sniper network is deployer-owned silo). SUSYE/DmA9 half is unambiguously dev (mass-arming + dust signaling cannot be explained under H2). Figg half H1-leaning (shared Bloom config + same on-ramp MP2 + same-slot synchronized launches at L10) but cashout-terminus convergence not yet exhaustively traced. To close to >90% H1: any Figg-cluster terminus reaching Bra1HUNK / 49mvMufi / J6YUyB4P (Coinbase deposit) or shared Fireblocks deposit.
evidence_pointers_kept_in_data_results.7dkvxgj_open_question: data/results/figg-phase-d-attribution-2026-04-25.json — 7DkvxGJbv9qiNGqqE7VZ5jdg6SLDgBtem7NgaiPmnrzA Arkham label '7dkvxg on Pump.fun' with 3 Created Tokens: HEZdEXw8rirh9NhY9aqyDC3ExGzMs2hQRTRpASD8pump, zjZfVkorGxFT6TyHSv2a34SK9TuEEoh4az34jfUpump, CcDdm6YQX5Z6mrq68siqepNUSTjRWQ3McKR89aGFXray. Decisive H1/H2 test deferred: if any block-0 buyer of these 3 tokens is in Figg-cluster or known deployer-network, that's H1-decisive.

follow_up_destinations_unprofiled.context: Received 16.767 SOL from RXRP-chain candidate id 86 (FTX-US-insider chain).
Received 19.9 SOL from MP1 candidate id 77.

infrastructure_attribution_preserved_pre.description: Attribution-grade endpoint addresses that were only documented in deleted source files. Lower-priority than novel_wallets, but worth preserving so future passes don't re-derive.

fireblocks_9cdd_top_outflow_terminuses.context: Top USD outflow targets from registry's Fireblocks Custody address 9cDDJ5g2wPqVZUZwpPuwqzxN7ouvc6QFauFwrX2TTTAX. Source: data/results/figg-hop3-trace.json (deleted in commit da64bafc), referenced from SESSION_HANDOFF_2026-04-25_PART3_7DK_FIREBLOCKS.md §4.2 B5 + §6.3 (also being deleted in this pass).

addresses.volume: $20M (handoff was internally inconsistent on USDT vs USDC; preserve dollar volume only)

fireblocks_9cdd_top_outflow_terminuses.next_step: Probe each for Arkham labels — may resolve as Fireblocks-internal trading routes vs specific exchange deposits. Decisive for the H1/H2 cashout-terminus convergence test.

ed4ugbwk_profit_pass_1_cashout_endpoints.context: Cashout terminus addresses for the profit_pass_1 → Ed4UGBWK → exchange-deposit chain. Source: archive/raw-results/suspect-address-verification.json + infra-verify.json (both deleted in this pass). Registry's profit_pass_1 entry describes '$247K out, 711 txs' but does not enumerate destinations — these 13 endpoints are the destinations. Labels are Nansen-attributed.
ed4ugbwk_profit_pass_1_cashout_endpoints.framing: Extends profit_extraction_map. Routes A/D/E/F documented Coinbase/Rollbit/Binance/Fireblocks. Stake.com / Shuffle.com / Bitvavo / Bitgo / KuCoin are net-new endpoint attribution at the profit_pass_1 → Ed4UGBWK cashout layer.
